title: vanilla reborn +
description: Good animations, sounds , optimization and new bioms
body:
# Welcome

## Boost Performance: 
To make your gameplay smoother, this modpack includes performance mods such as Sodium, Lithium, Krypton, and ModernFix.  Thanks to these mods, you can achieve higher FPS values and a more stable gaming experience.

## Visual Feast:
With mods like Iris Shaders, Continuity, Enhanced Block Entities, and AmbientSounds 6, your game world becomes more vibrant and impressive. Experience a visual and auditory feast with realistic shadows, enhanced block models, enriched sound effects, and much more.

## Not:
And if you want to play with your friends, you can play with the e4mc mod.


## Features;

### Performance and Optimization Modes:

* BadOptimizations (by thosea)
* Chunky (Fabric) (by pop4959)
* Debugify (by isXander)
* ImmediatelyFast (by RaphiMC)
* Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (by ishlandmc)
* Dynamic FPS (by juliand665, LostLuma)
* FerriteCore (Fabric) (by malte0811)
* Indium (by comp500)
* Krypton (by tuxed)
* Lithium (Fabric/NeoForge) (by JellySquid)
* ModernFix (by embeddedt)
* MoreCulling (by FX_PR0CESS)
* Sodium (by JellySquid)

### Visual and cosmetic modes:

* AmbientSounds 6 (by CreativeMD)
* Continuity (by Pepper_Bell)
* Enhanced Block Entities (by FoundationGames)
* [EMF] Entity Model Features [Fabric & Forge] (by Traben)
* [ETF] Entity Texture Features - [Fabric & Forge] (by Traben)
* First-person Model (Forge/Fabric) (by tr7zw)
* Iris Shaders (by coderbot, IMS21)
* Lithostitched (by Apollo, SmellyModder)
* Model Gap Fix (by MehVahdJukaar)
* Noisium (by Steveplays28)
* Not Enough Animations (by tr7zw)
* Presence Footsteps (by S0llace)
* Skin Layers 3D (Fabric/Forge) (by tr7zw)
* Sodium Extra (by FlashyReese)
* Sodium/Embeddium Dynamic Lights (by Txni)
* Sodium/Embeddium Extras (by Txni)
* Zoomify (by isXander)

### World Creation and Biom Modes:

* Terralith (by Starmute, the_catter1)

### Tools mods:

* CreativeCore (by CreativeMD)
* CreativeCore (by CreativeMD)
* Just Enough Items (JEI) (by mezz)
* WorldEdit (by sk89q, wizjany_, me4502, octylFractal)

### Library modes:

* Cloth Config API (Fabric/Forge/NeoForge) (by shedaniel, LinkieIsBetterThanK9)
* Fabric API (by modmuss50, sfPlayer1)
* Fabric Language Kotlin (by modmuss50, sfPlayer1)
* Konkrete [Fabric] (by Keksuccino)
* Melody (by Keksuccino)
* Moonlight Lib (by MehVahdJukaar)
* Project-922508 (by RKeblawi)
* Reese's Sodium Options (by FlashyReese)
* Sodium/Embeddium Options API (by Txni)
* YetAnotherConfigLib (by isXander)

### Others mods:

* Amendments (by plantspookable, MehVahdJukaar)
* CICADA (by enjarai)
* Do a Barrel Roll (by enjarai)
* Dynamic FPS (by juliand665, LostLuma)
* Fabric Seasons (by D4rkness_King)
* Inmis (by Draylar1)
* InmisAddon (by Globox_Z)
* LuckPerms (by Iucko)
* Mod Menu (by Prospector)
* No Chat Reports (by Aizistral)
* Plasmo Voice (by KPidS, Apehum)
* Supplementaries (by MehVahdJukaar)
* Very Many Players (Fabric) (by ishlandmc)
